tab.title: Active catalog categories
tab.description: Manage the category tree for prices, product placement, and publishing.
tab.archiveWarning: Note: archived and inactive categories cannot accept active product placements. If active products are already here, validation and publishing may be blocked until placements are moved or deactivated.
tab.empty: No categories yet. Create the first root category above.

category.archiveConfirm: Archiving the category may affect active products: archived and inactive categories cannot accept active placements. Continue?

errors.csrf: Could not prepare the secured form. Try again.
errors.createChildFailed: Could not create the child category.
errors.reorderFailed: Could not update the category order.

placement.title: Products in the selected category
placement.description: Search active products, add them to categories, and reorder them.
placement.hint: Archived and inactive products and categories cannot be used in active placements.

empty.noSelection: Create or activate a category before adding products.
empty.noActiveProducts: This category has no active products yet.

errors.noCategory: Pick an active category that accepts placements.
errors.noProduct: Pick an active product from the master catalog.
errors.duplicateActive: The product already has an active placement in this catalog.
errors.addFailed: Could not add the product to the category.
errors.reorderFailed: Could not update the product order.

placement.moveConfirm: This product is already actively placed in category “{{currentCategory}}”. Move it to “{{targetCategory}}”?
